Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Explicitly covers vocabulary for 'Le logement' (housing) and 'les transports' (transport), which are key components of sustainable cities (Targets 11.1, 11.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Explicitly covers vocabulary for 'La justice' (justice) and 'Les médias' (media), relating to rule of law (Target 16.3) and access to information (Target 16.10).
